purpose: Reconcile implementation readiness evidence before any live PP&D crawl or authenticated DevHub automation is enabled.

evidence_catalog.summary: Reviewed metadata outcomes fixture for source registry update candidate validation.
Validator coverage for stale guardrail audit packets and unresolved stale predicate handling.
Fixture-backed synthetic agent response regression matrix coverage.
Commit-safe attended pilot evidence template validation fixture.

source_registry_update_candidate.summary: Documents the source registry update candidate without mutating the live registry.

stale_guardrail_audit.summary: Flags stale guardrail evidence that must be reconciled before release.

agent_response_regression_matrix.summary: Tracks fixture-backed agent response expectations and regressions.

attended_pilot_evidence_template.summary: Defines evidence fields for a future attended pilot without creating live browser artifacts or submissions.

release_blockers.summary: The source registry update remains a candidate fixture and has not been reconciled into an approved registry change.
The stale guardrail audit requires human review before any release can enable automation beyond deterministic fixtures.
Agent response behavior is covered by deterministic synthetic fixtures only and is not a release approval for official actions.
Attended pilot evidence is represented only as a template and contains no validated live pilot record.
